name: Londax Corp.
summary: PART I . DESCRIPTION OF BUSINESS Our company was established as a Wyoming corporation on May 19, 2023. As a developmental-stage enterprise, our primary focus is on offering IT consulting services and software development solutions. Our web site is https://londaxcorp.com/. Currently, we have developed and implemented our flagship product https://londax.ai/, which comprises a Customer Relationship Management (CRM) System, Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS), and out-staffing services.
